## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behaviour

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened? Include error messages, logs, or screenshots where relevant.
